ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement parameter */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the measurement parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement parameter */,
  "region_of_interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region of interest */,
  "coverage_of_region_of_interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coverage of region of interest */,
  "horizontal_spatial_resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horizontal spatial resolution */,
  "vertical_spatial_resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vertical spatial resolution */,
  "temporal_resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temporal resolution */,
  "spectral_resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectral resolution */,
  "spectral_sampling_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectral sampling */,
  "day_night_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day and night acquisition */,
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accuracy */,
  "penetration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penetration */,
  "polarimetry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polarimetry */,
  "three_d_id" INTEGER /* ID of the 3D measurement */,
  "all_weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the all-weather acquisition */,
  "swath_id" INTEGER /* ID of the swath */,
  "on_board_calibration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the on-board calibration */,
  "radiometric_accuracy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiometric accuracy */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data is of good quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_penetration_id FOREIGN KEY ("penetration_id") REFERENCES penetrations ("penetration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_day_night_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_night_id") REFERENCES day_night ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_on_board_calibration_id FOREIGN KEY ("on_board_calibration_id") REFERENCES on_board_calibrations ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_polarimetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("polarimetry_id") REFERENCES polarimetries ("polarimetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_vertical_spatial_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("vertical_spatial_resolution_id") REFERENCES vertical_spatial_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_accuracy_id FOREIGN KEY ("accuracy_id") REFERENCES accuracies ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_three_d_id FOREIGN KEY ("three_d_id") REFERENCES three_d ("three_d_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_radiometric_accuracy_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiometric_accuracy_id") REFERENCES radiometric_accuracies ("accuracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_spectral_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectral_resolution_id") REFERENCES spectral_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_spectral_sampling_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectral_sampling_id") REFERENCES spectral_samplings ("sampling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_temporal_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("temporal_resolution_id") REFERENCES temporal_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_swath_id FOREIGN KEY ("swath_id") REFERENCES swaths ("swath_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_region_of_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_of_interest_id") REFERENCES regions_of_interest ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_horizontal_spatial_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("horizontal_spatial_resolution_id") REFERENCES horizontal_spatial_resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_all_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("all_weather_id") REFERENCES all_weathers ("all_weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_coverage_of_region_of_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_of_region_of_interest_id") REFERENCES coverage_of_regions ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_of_interest" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region of interest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region of interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region of interest */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region of interest */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region of interest */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the region of interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_of_regions" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage of region of interest */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region of interest */,
  "coverage_description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage of the region of interest */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., full, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horizontal_spatial_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horizontal spatial resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the horizontal spatial resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the horizontal spatial resolution */,
  "resolution_value" TEXT /* Value of the horizontal spatial resolution (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vertical_spatial_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertical spatial resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the vertical spatial resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vertical spatial resolution */,
  "resolution_value" TEXT /* Value of the vertical spatial resolution (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temporal_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temporal resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the temporal resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temporal resolution */,
  "resolution_value" TEXT /* Value of the temporal resolution (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectral resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spectral resolution */,
  "resolution_value" TEXT /* Value of the spectral resolution (in nanometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_samplings" (
  "sampling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral sampling */,
  "sampling_name" TEXT /* Name of the spectral sampling */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spectral sampling */,
  "sampling_value" TEXT /* Value of the spectral sampling (in nanometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampling_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_night" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day and night acquisition */,
  "acquisition_name" TEXT /* Name of the day and night acquisition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day and night acquisition */,
  "acquisition_time" TEXT /* Time of the acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracies" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy */,
  "accuracy_name" TEXT /* Name of the accuracy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accuracy */,
  "accuracy_value" TEXT /* Value of the accuracy (in percent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penetrations" (
  "penetration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penetration */,
  "penetration_name" TEXT /* Name of the penetration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penetration */,
  "penetration_value" TEXT /* Value of the penetration (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penetration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polarimetries" (
  "polarimetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polarimetry */,
  "polarimetry_name" TEXT /* Name of the polarimetry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polarimetry */,
  "polarization_mode" TEXT /* Mode of polarization (e.g., linear, circular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polarimetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "three_d" (
  "three_d_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 3D measurement */,
  "three_d_name" TEXT /* Name of the 3D measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the 3D measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of 3D measurement (e.g., point cloud, mesh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("three_d_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "all_weathers" (
  "all_weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each all-weather acquisition */,
  "all_weather_name" TEXT /* Name of the all-weather acquisition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the all-weather acquisition */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., clear, cloudy, rainy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("all_weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swaths" (
  "swath_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each swath */,
  "swath_name" TEXT /* Name of the swath */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the swath */,
  "swath_width" TEXT /* Width of the swath (in kilometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swath_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "on_board_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each on-board calibration */,
  "calibration_name" TEXT /* Name of the on-board calibration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the on-board calibration */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration (e.g., radiometric, geometric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiometric_accuracies" (
  "accuracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiometric accuracy */,
  "accuracy_name" TEXT /* Name of the radiometric accuracy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the radiometric accuracy */,
  "accuracy_value" TEXT /* Value of the radiometric accuracy (in percent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accuracy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the data product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of data product (e.g., image, dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satellite */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)
